text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Navigator Programs * African American Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Drug Use Disorder Issues Hispanic/Latino Community Homelessness Issues Native American Community Pregnant Individuals AIDS/HIV Issues Pregnant Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND OREGON HEALTH PLAN COMMUNITY PARTNER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports under-served communities with health coverage, including enrollment assistance, plan selection, and follow-up for public (Oregon Health Plan) and private insurance. Guides clients through the application process and promotes equitable access to health insurance for African American Oregonians. 3934 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on the African American community Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 280-2600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND OREGON HEALTH PLAN COMMUNITY PARTNER
